cases.prompt: 이 랜딩 페이지 디자인이 AI 느낌 나는지 확인해줘

assertions.text: The agent runs the 10-point slop detection checklist against the design.
The agent provides a numeric score (0-10) with per-item PASS/FAIL.
For each FAIL, the agent names the specific slop signal and suggests a concrete fix.
The agent references core principles (3-color, spacing rhythm, etc.) when critiquing.
The agent suggests looking at specific reference sources for inspiration.

cases.prompt: 새 SaaS 랜딩 페이지 디자인 해줘. AI 느낌 없게.

assertions.text: Before generating any design, the agent asks for or suggests reference sites to review.
The design uses maximum 3 non-neutral colors.
The landing page follows the 5-section structure (Hero, Features, Social Proof, How It Works, CTA).
No decorative gradient backgrounds in the design.
Copy uses specific outcomes, not generic 'Transform your workflow' language.
The agent runs the slop checklist on its own output before presenting.
